description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits a generally ovate shape with serrated margins. Venation is pinnate, with a prominent midrib. Leaf surface appears textured, potentially due to pubescence or minor surface irregularities. Overall leaf condition appears compromised."} {"description": "Diffuse, irregular chlorosis is observed across the majority of the leaf surface. No distinct, defined necrotic or sporulating lesions are visible. The chlorosis appears to be systemic rather than localized."} Chlorosis is widespread and relatively uniform across the leaf blade, though slightly more pronounced towards the margins. No clear pattern of distribution is evident, suggesting a systemic or non-localized infection/stressor.
